title: I Release Self-Doubt and Allow Confidence With Wealth
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing doubt about your capacity to handle significant money
excerpt: A short energy statement for the doubt that sits not around money coming in, but around your ability to manage it once it's there. The release names the specific fear of mishandling; the allow points toward calm capability.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 65 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when self-doubt about financial capability is present: the sense of not being ready for significant money, or of not knowing how to handle it well.

content.text: A short energy statement for the specific self-doubt that can sit alongside financial ambition: not 'will money come?' but 'can I handle it when it does?' The release names that doubt clearly; the allow names the confident capability that is already developing.
I am ready to release every doubt about my ability to manage and hold significant wealth. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow calm, steady confidence in my capacity to hold and grow great wealth. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 65 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
